# Bundled textures

Real-photo maps so the game still works with NO internet (school laptops, LAN).
All downsized from the MIT-licensed [three-globe](https://github.com/vasturiano/three-globe)
example assets (© Vasco Asturiano); imagery originally from NASA (public domain):

- `earth_day.jpg` — NASA Blue Marble (day side)
- `earth_night.jpg` — NASA Earth at Night (city lights; used as the emissive map)
- `earth_clouds.jpg` — cloud cover, grayscale (used as an alpha map on the cloud shell)
- `milkyway.jpg` — night-sky panorama (the scene background skysphere)

If a file is missing the game falls back to the procedural painted planets — nothing breaks.
